[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands indoors in front of a mirror, posing in a dark hoodie and black pants while reflected in the background.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, slightly messy hair is standing near a corner, facing the camera with their body turned slightly. They are wearing a dark hooded sweatshirt with drawstrings and a small emblem on the chest area, along with black pants with a circular patch on the right thigh area. Their left hand is placed near the waistband, and they are wearing a wristwatch with a square face.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors in a small bathroom or restroom area. The walls are light-colored with tiled surfaces, and there is a wall mirror positioned to the right of the person showing their reflection. A bright light fixture is visible above the mirror.

Visual Details:
The person’s clothing is predominantly black, with light-colored drawstrings on the hoodie and a silver-toned zipper or stitching detail on the pants. The mirror reflection shows the person from a similar angle, with their posture and hand placement visible. The lighting is warm and even, coming from above, creating soft highlights on the mirror and tiled wall. On the left side, a white sink or countertop edge is partially visible, and a small device or panel with a faint green light is mounted below the counter area.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing in dark casual clothing indoors near a bathroom sink area. A mirror on the wall reflects their stance and outfit.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair is leaning against a marble wall in what appears to be a public restroom. He is wearing a black Nike hoodie with a white swoosh logo on the chest and black sweatpants with white piping. A silver cross necklace hangs around his neck. He has a backpack slung over one shoulder and a wristwatch on his left wrist. His right hand is tucked into the waistband of his sweatpants.

The background features a large, well-lit mirror reflecting the man and the space behind him. The mirror is framed by a bright, warm light source, possibly a vanity light. To the left of the man is a white automatic hand dryer with a green indicator light, labeled "American Standard." The walls are tiled with a light-colored marble pattern, and the countertop in front of the mirror is made of speckled granite.

The lighting is somewhat dim, with a strong accent from the mirror's light, creating highlights on the man's clothing and skin, and a soft glow on the marble surfaces. The color palette is dominated by blacks, grays, and whites, with the warm lighting adding a subtle golden hue. The overall mood is casual and slightly moody, with the reflection in the mirror adding a sense of depth and introspection. The style is contemporary streetwear.
